layout_strategy.structure: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_strategy.alignment: Strict left-alignment for logs and tabular data. Optical alignment for icons.

surface_styles.cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look): 1px solid border-zinc-800, flat background (zinc-900 or zinc-950/50 backdrop-blur-md), zero shadow. Use rounded-sm.
surface_styles.inputs: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-50 rounded-sm focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-white focus-visible:border-white transition-all.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-zinc-950 hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500/20 rounded-sm

motion_interactions.pulse: Active monitoring items must feature an animate-pulse opacity effect on a green/red dot to signify live connection.
motion_interactions.hover: Explicit hover states. Table rows: hover:bg-zinc-900/50. Buttons: transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion_interactions.loading: Use monospace ASCII-like loaders or simple thin spinners.

components.name: QR Pairing Widget
components.description: A focused container showing a mock WhatsApp QR code. It must include an 'Awaiting Connection' amber badge and clear technical instructions.

components.name: Live Status Badge
components.description: Small pill with a pulsating dot and monospace text ('ONLINE', 'OFFLINE'). Green for online, Zinc for offline.

components.name: Phone Number Form
components.description: Input field with a persistent '+' prefix, paired with an 'Add Monitor' button. Clean sharp edges.

components.name: Activity Feed / Log Table
components.description: A dense, strictly aligned list or table displaying timestamp (JetBrains Mono), phone number, and event type. Looks like a server tail log.

components.name: Active Monitors List
components.description: A grid or list of currently tracked numbers with their latest status and a 'Remove' action.

icons.style: Clean, line-based, size 16px to 20px maximum. Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2.

login_bg.description: Dark minimal abstract background with subtle glowing data nodes. Use as a low opacity background for the app shell or empty state.

empty_state_radar.description: Abstract dark mode radar graphic. Use for empty states when no number is currently being monitored.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and import Google Fonts: 'Chivo' (headings), 'IBM Plex Sans' (body), and 'JetBrains Mono' (monospace/logs) in the main CSS or index.html.
Force dark mode across the application. Background must be `bg-zinc-950` everywhere. Do not use generic white themes.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn card styles with large drop shadows and rounded-xl. Override to use `border-zinc-800` and `rounded-sm` with flat backgrounds.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout. Avoid vast empty spaces. Organize the screen into logical, bordered panels (e.g., QR pairing panel, Add Number panel, Logs panel).
For the Logs table and timestamps, heavily utilize `font-mono text-xs`. Space rows tightly (`py-2`).
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, list items) have `data-testid` attributes in kebab-case based on role (e.g., `data-testid='add-monitor-button'`).
Avoid purple or teal gradients. Use strictly white, zinc, green (online), amber (waiting), and red (offline/error).
Make the real-time activity feed feel like an observability terminal (e.g., highlighting new rows briefly, or keeping it strictly text-focused).
